name: Scotch Shortbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter until soft.
2. Add sugar and almond extract, and beat until smooth.
3. Add flour and salt; mix well.
4. Press dough evenly into a greased 11 x 7 x 2-inch pan.
5. Mark the dough in 1-1/2 inch squares with a fork.
6. Bake at 375°F for 25 minutes.
7. Cut along markings while hot.
8. Cool in the pan.
